category_sources: source_facts.description says minimal multiplexing IRC client; official suckless sic page describes it as a simple IRC client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sic; official suckless page and git repository title use sic.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official suckless sic page; official suckless git repository includes README and manpage files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official suckless sic page links to the source repository and clone URL at git.suckless.org/sic.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official suckless pages identify sic as a minimal/simple IRC client with command-line usage.
